overall.description: Gameplay footage from a fantasy RPG showing a wizard character exiting a gothic castle interior into stormy night grounds. The character walks along cobblestone paths through courtyards and gardens, passing lamp posts and stone archways toward distant castle towers under a dramatic cloudy sky.

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a dimly lit gothic castle interior, descending stone stairs and moving through a corridor with rough stone walls. Warm torchlight illuminates the path toward a large wooden door at the corridor's end.

segments.scene_description: The character opens the heavy wooden door, transitioning from the warm torch-lit interior to the cool, stormy night outside. The door swings open to reveal a cobblestone courtyard, iron lamp posts, and dramatic cloud formations above the castle towers.

segments.scene_description: Walking through the open castle courtyard at night, passing iron lamp posts and stone benches along the wet cobblestone path. The character approaches a stone archway gate while castle towers loom against the stormy sky ahead.

segments.scene_description: Passing through the stone archway into a garden area dense with vegetation and flowering bushes. The cobblestone path continues toward the main castle building, now visible through the trees with warm lights glowing from its windows under the stormy night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the warm, enclosed depths of a gothic castle interior out into a stormy, expansive night landscape. It begins by descending stone stairs through a dimly lit corridor where flickering torchlight guides the way toward a heavy wooden door. As the door swings open, the warm interior glow gives way to the cool tones of a stormy night, revealing a wet cobblestone courtyard flanked by iron lamp posts under a dramatic, cloudy sky. The camera then moves forward past stone benches and through a looming archway gate, transitioning from the open courtyard into a lush garden dense with flowering bushes. Finally, the path leads deeper into the vegetation toward the main castle building, where warm lights glow from the windows against the dark, turbulent atmosphere.
